name: Florian Wirtz

current_form.value: Joined Liverpool in 2025 for a club-record fee (~£100m plus bonuses, a Premier League record). His debut 2025-26 season was a difficult adaptation as Liverpool struggled for consistency; reported ~17 goal contributions in ~49 appearances across all competitions, with only 5 Premier League goals. Has become Germany's primary creator alongside Musiala.

fitness.value: Fit; no reported injury concerns ahead of the tournament. Named in Germany's 26-man squad.

wc_role.value: Selected in Germany's 26-man World Cup 2026 squad on 21 May 2026; his first World Cup. A primary creator for Nagelsmann's side. Germany in Group E with Curaçao, Côte d'Ivoire and Ecuador.

image_todo: fetch + verify a Creative-Commons portrait; no fabricated URLs
